description: Locale conventions for the Philippines market. Configures date formats (DD/MM/YYYY), currency (PHP — Philippine Peso), address formatting, number formatting (period decimal, comma thousands), and measurement units appropriate for Philippine healthcare facilities.

configurationKeys.description: Date display format for PH locale (DD/MM/YYYY).
Number formatting conventions for PH locale.

capabilityContributions.description: PH locale conventions required for correct date, currency, and number display in Philippine market tenants.
